query: SELECT sp.id, sp.external_user_id, sp.aluno_id, a.nome as aluno_nome, sp.competencia_name, sp.media_avaliacoes_respondidas, sp.media_avaliacoes_disponiveis, sp.progresso_total, sp.total_aulas, sp.aulas_disponiveis, sp.aulas_concluidas, sp.aulas_em_andamento, sp.avaliacoes_respondidas, sp.avaliacoes_disponiveis FROM student_performance sp LEFT JOIN alunos a ON sp.aluno_id = a.id WHERE a.nome LIKE '%Joseane%' OR a.nome LIKE '%Millena%' OR a.nome LIKE '%Wandemberg%' LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT sp.id, sp.external_user_id, sp.aluno_id, a.nome as aluno_nome, sp.competencia_name, sp.media_avaliacoes_respondidas, sp.media_avaliacoes_disponiveis, sp.progresso_total, sp.total_aulas, sp.aulas_disponiveis, sp.aulas_concluidas, sp.aulas_em_andamento, sp.avaliacoes_respondidas, sp.avaliacoes_disponiveis FROM student_performance sp LEFT JOIN alunos a ON sp.aluno_id = a.id WHERE a.nome LIKE '%Joseane%' OR a.nome LIKE '%Millena%' OR a.nome LIKE '%Wandemberg%' LIMIT 30;
